name: W-Wing Catapult
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｗ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ダブル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ウィング・カタパルト
desc: Once per turn, you can either: Target 1 "V-Tiger Jet" you control; equip this card to that target, OR: Unequip this card and Special Summon it. If the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle or card effect, destroy this card instead. The equipped monster gains 400 ATK/DEF.
mnst_eff: Once per turn, you can either: Target 1 "V-Tiger Jet" you control; equip this card to that target, OR: Unequip this card and Special Summon it. If the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle or card effect, destroy this card instead. The equipped monster gains 400 ATK/DEF.
eff: Once per turn, you can either: Target 1 "V-Tiger Jet" you control; equip this card to that target, OR: Unequip this card and Special Summon it. If the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle or card effect, destroy this card instead. The equipped monster gains 400 ATK/DEF.

sets.set: Speed Duel GX: Duel Academy Box

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
